mapper.insert: insert into document_upload_chunks ( upload_id, chunk_index, chunk_size, chunk_hash, storage_bucket, storage_object_key, uploaded_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{uploadId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkSize}, #{chunkHash}, #{storageBucket}, #{storageObjectKey}, #{uploadedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

insert into document_upload_chunks ( upload_id, chunk_index, chunk_size, chunk_hash, storage_bucket, storage_object_key, uploaded_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{uploadId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkSize}, #{chunkHash}, #{storageBucket}, #{storageObjectKey}, #{uploadedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) on conflict (upload_id, chunk_index) do update set chunk_size = excluded.chunk_size, chunk_hash = excluded.chunk_hash, storage_bucket = excluded.storage_bucket, storage_object_key = excluded.storage_object_key, uploaded_at = excluded.uploaded_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select id, upload_id, chunk_index, chunk_size, chunk_hash, storage_bucket, storage_object_key, uploaded_at, created_at, updated_at from document_upload_chunks where upload_id = #{uploadId} order by chunk_index asc, id asc
